objective: Convert the Wave 37 signature-profile support diagnostic into an explicit target-contract gate that can pass support while blocking supervision promotion until replay, split, and baseline requirements exist.
non_negotiables: The signature target contract report must keep diagnostic support separate from supervision eligibility.
The promotion gate must remain closed until a versioned exact value rule, replay-compatible provenance, split semantics, and deterministic/model baselines exist.
The contract report must consume the Wave 37 report rather than reinterpreting selected rows by hand.
Do not change existing composition shard bytes or model claims in this wave.

tasks.prompt: Add a Partizan report command that reads a generated signature-profile search report, validates target support and no-reuse checks, and emits a contract report whose support gate can pass while the promotion gate remains blocked.
outputs: Smoke test covering passing support and duplicate-signature failure
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: The command reports support_gate.passed=true on the Wave 37 report.
The command reports promotion_gate.passed=false with explicit blockers.
The smoke test fails a duplicate component-signature selection.

tasks.prompt: Run the signature target contract command on the Wave 37 report and update the evidence ledger. Emphasize that support passed but promotion remains blocked until replay-compatible provenance, split semantics, deterministic floors, and learned baselines are implemented.
outputs: Experiment matrix row with report hash
Claim and verification-gate updates that preserve the promotion blocker
acceptance: Report records support_gate.passed=true with 30 selected rows and 10 rows per topology family.
Report records promotion_gate.passed=false with the four missing prerequisites.
Docs state that the contract is not supervision eligibility.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_38_signature_target_contract.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 38 plan is internally consistent.
The signature support gate passes and the promotion blocker remains explicit.

integration_gates.command: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py && python3 engine/test.py && git diff --check
